channel.title: Options on Coriva
channel.description: Recent content in Options on Coriva

item.title: 0DTE Options Explained: Mechanics, Greeks, and Real P&L Distribution
item.description: A mechanics-first guide to 0DTE options: how Gamma and Theta collapse on the final trading day, payoff profiles for the three main player types, the real P&L distribution from academic studies, and why most retail buyers lose money.

item.title: Option Greeks Calculator: Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega Online Tool
item.description: Free online option Greeks calculator: instantly compute Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega and second-order Greeks (Vanna, Charm, Volga) with interactive charts. Based on the Black-Scholes model.

item.title: Volatility Trading Strategies: 6 Ways to Go Long or Short Vol
item.description: Compare 6 volatility trading strategies: Long Straddle, Strangle, Calendar Spread, Short Straddle, Short Strangle, Iron Condor. Use IV Rank to pick the right one.

item.title: Option Greeks in Practice: Strategy Analysis, Hedging, and Gamma Scalping
item.description: Option Greeks in action: strategy decomposition with Greeks, Python-simulated Delta hedging, Gamma Scalping P&L walkthrough, and market-maker risk management.

item.title: Second-Order Greeks: Vanna, Charm, Volga and Volatility Surfaces
item.description: Second-order option Greeks with Python code: Vanna, Charm, and Volga formulas, intuitive explanations, and their role in shaping the volatility surface.

item.title: Option Greeks: Formulas, Python Code, and Charts
item.description: A practical guide to option Greeks under the Black-Scholes framework: Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega formulas with Python code, market-maker hedging insights, and visualizations.
